race.comment: BOA VISTA (8) gets the nod. She ran well first up at Geelong, off a year-long spell. She should be much better for that having shown good early ability. Expect Neindorf gets her in a handy spot and takes beating. WEASEL SEA (4) has placed in all three runs to date, sticking on well for third last time at Seymour. He'll cross from out wide and give a huge sight. ANDJULIET (6) is a filly by Russian Camelot on debut for the Robbie Griffiths yard. She's been jumping out well and looks ready to go from a good draw. BLONDIE'S AWARD (7) just found one better first up at Sale and should take some beating with added fitness. DONEBRAVO (1) next best.
